assertion_results.text: The plan determines feature-branch workflow mode (not direct-to-main) based on the atomicity constraints in the feature description
assertion_results.evidence: impact-map.md contains 'Mode: feature-branch' under 'Workflow Mode Decision' and provides rationale based on atomicity constraints: 'Coordinated schema migration', 'Tightly coupled code and schema changes', and 'The feature description explicitly states "All changes must land together."'

assertion_results.text: A bookend task with Bookend Type create-branch is generated as the first task in the plan
assertion_results.evidence:
task-1-create-feature-branch.md is the first task and contains '## Bookend Type
create-branch'

assertion_results.text: A bookend task with Bookend Type merge-branch is generated as the last task in the plan
assertion_results.evidence:
task-8-merge-feature-branch.md is the last task (out of 8 tasks) and contains '## Bookend Type
merge-branch'

assertion_results.text: All intermediate tasks (between the create-branch and merge-branch bookend tasks) have Target Branch set to TC-9005
assertion_results.evidence:
All intermediate tasks (2-7) have '## Target Branch
TC-9005': task-2 line 8, task-3 line 8, task-4 line 8, task-5 line 8, task-6 line 8, task-7 line 8.

assertion_results.text: The create-branch bookend task has Target Branch set to main
The merge-branch bookend task has Target Branch set to main
All intermediate tasks list the create-branch bookend task as a dependency
assertion_results.evidence: All intermediate tasks (2-7) list Task 1 as a dependency: Task 2: 'Depends on: Task 1 -- Create feature branch TC-9005 from main'; Task 3: 'Depends on: Task 1 -- Create feature branch TC-9005 from main'; Task 4: 'Depends on: Task 1 -- Create feature branch TC-9005 from main'; Task 5: 'Depends on: Task 1 -- Create feature branch TC-9005 from main'; Task 6: 'Depends on: Task 1 -- Create feature branch TC-9005 from main'; Task 7: 'Depends on: Task 1 -- Create feature branch TC-9005 from main'.

assertion_results.text: The merge-branch bookend task lists all intermediate tasks as dependencies
assertion_results.evidence: task-8-merge-feature-branch.md Dependencies section lists all 6 intermediate tasks: 'Depends on: Task 2', 'Depends on: Task 3', 'Depends on: Task 4', 'Depends on: Task 5', 'Depends on: Task 6', 'Depends on: Task 7'.

assertion_results.text: Each task file contains all required template sections: Repository, Target Branch, Description, at least one of Files to Modify or Files to Create, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements
assertion_results.evidence: Bookend tasks (1, 8) have Repository, Target Branch, Bookend Type, Description, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements (bookends are exempt from Files to Modify/Create and Implementation Notes per grading rules). Intermediate tasks (2-7) all have: Repository, Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements. Files: Task 2 has Files to Create and Files to Modify; Task 3 has Files to Modify and Files to Create (listed as 'None'); Task 4 has Files to Modify; Task 5 has Files to Modify; Task 6 has Files to Modify; Task 7 has Files to Modify. Implementation Notes: Tasks 2-7 all have Implementation Notes sections.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes a workflow:feature-branch label decision to be applied to the feature issue
assertion_results.evidence: impact-map.md contains 'Label: `workflow:feature-branch`' in the Workflow Mode Decision section (line 10).
